Part.Source:
Event Start
retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAPRECO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &TabelaPrecoNiv)
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod
&PadRotLin = 'ATPRC' + trim(Str(&EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs) &numeric = &sdtAtualizaPreco.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos.'
&AtualizarMarKup = true padraoUsuario.Call('L', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod) if &PadObsMark = '0' &AtualizarMarKup = false endif
&filtTabCod = &parTabCod for Each Order EmpCod, TabCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &filtTabCod &TabIsPerCol1 = TabIsPerCol1 &TabUltAlt = TabUltAlt Exit EndFor if &TabUltAlt <= 0 &TabUltAlt = 1 EndIF
For Each Order EmpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod
&Pln1TabCod = Pln1TabCod &VlrPln1TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln1TabCod) &Pln2TabCod = Pln2TabCod &VlrPln2TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln2TabCod) &Pln3TabCod = Pln3TabCod &VlrPln3TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln3TabCod) &Pln4TabCod = Pln4TabCod &VlrPln4TabCod.Title = 'T.' + trim(Pln4TabCod)
If Pln1TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln1TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln2TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln2TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln3TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln3TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If Pln4TabCod.IsEmpty() &vlrPln4TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF
Exit EndFor
&UmConRaz = 'Conc_1' &DoisConProVlr.Visible = 0 &UmConProVlr.Visible = 0 For Each Order ConEmpCod, ConCod Where ConEmpCod = &EmpCod Where ConIsAtv = true
Do Case Case &UmConCod.IsEmpty() &UmConCod = ConCod &UmConRaz = Substr(ConRaz,1,10) &UmConProVlr.Visible = 1
CAse &DoisConCod.IsEmpty() &DoisConProVlr.Visible = 1 &DoisConProVlr.Title = Substr(ConRaz,1,10) &DoisConCod = ConCod
Otherwise Exit EndCase EndFor
&UmConProVlr.Title = &UmConRaz
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 &ActionsData = new()
&ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Concorrentes' &ActionsDataItem.Link = WWConcorrente.Link() &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem)
&ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Tabelas Preço' &ActionsDataItem.EventKey = !'Tabelas' &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem)
&ActionsDataItem = new() &ActionsDataItem.Title = 'Remover da Tabela' &ActionsDataItem.EventKey = !'RemoverMarcados' &ActionsDataItem.IsDivider = False &ActionsData.Add(&ActionsDataItem)
GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. &ActionSelecione.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionColumn' &gridProGraRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProNomGra.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstQtd.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &ProVlrCus.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VlrPln1TabCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VlrPln2TabCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VlrPln3TabCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &VlrPln4TabCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &UmConProVlr.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &DoisConProVlr.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridProIMC.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &ProNovPrc.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &LucroCalc.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &gridTabPrc1.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &NovoPreco.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &NovoAcre.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &NovoLucro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &SalvaLinha.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &GridCurrentPage = Grid.currentPage
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = ""
&gridProGraRef= ProGraRef &gridProNomGra = ProNomGra &gridMarNom = MarNom &gridProGraEstQtd = ProGraEstQtd &gridProIMC = ProIMC &gridTabPrc1 = TabPrc1 If ProCod <> ProEstProCod &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = !'WWActionColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoFirstColumn' &gridProGraRef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &ProVlrCus.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VlrPln1TabCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VlrPln2TabCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VlrPln3TabCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &VlrPln4TabCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &UmConProVlr.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &DoisConProVlr.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridProIMC.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &ProNovPrc.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &LucroCalc.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &gridTabPrc1.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &NovoPreco.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &NovoAcre.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &NovoLucro.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' &SalvaLinha.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo' Else &ActionSelecione.ColumnClass = 'WWActionColumn' &gridProGraRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO, !'WWColumn WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &gridProNomGra.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridMarNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' ProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProGraEstQtd.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &ProVlrCus.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VlrPln1TabCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VlrPln2TabCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VlrPln3TabCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &VlrPln4TabCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &UmConProVlr.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &DoisConProVlr.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridProIMC.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &ProNovPrc.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &LucroCalc.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &gridTabPrc1.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &NovoPreco.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &NovoAcre.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &NovoLucro.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &SalvaLinha.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
ProNomGra.Link = Produtos.Link('', TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod, '') ProNomGra.LinkTarget = '_blank'
if &UmConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &UmConCod, ProCod, &UmConProVlr) EndiF If &DoisConCod <> 0 RetornaValorConcorrente.Call(&EmpCod, &DoisConCod, ProCod, &DoisConProVlr) EndIF // &EstMin = EstMin
&UmConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0) &DoisConProVlr.ForeColor = RGB(200,130,0)
&vlrPln1TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln2TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln3TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40) &vlrPln4TabCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,140,40)
If not &Pln1TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln1TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln1TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln1TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) EndIF If not &Pln2TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln2TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln2TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln2TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln2TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln3TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln3TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln3TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln3TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln3TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF If not &Pln4TabCod.IsEmpty() and &Pln4TabCod <> '0' &vlrPln4TabCod = RetornaValorTab.UDP(EmpCod, &Pln4TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod) Else &vlrPln4TabCod.Visible = 0 EndIF
&ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &IsSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif
//SUGESTAO &ProNovPrc = 0
do case CAse ProEmbQtd > 0 and ProVlrCus > 0 &ProVlrCus = round(ProVlrCus / ProEmbQtd, 5) CAse ProEmbQtd < 0 &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus * ProEmbQtd Otherwise &ProVlrCus = ProVlrCus EndCase
IF &ProVlrCus > 0 and ProIMC <> 0 &ProNovPrc = round((&ProVlrCus * ( 1 + (ProIMC/100))), 2) EndIF &ProNovPrc.Tooltiptext = '[Nv.Custo] * (1 + ([%Acrs.]/100))'
TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) if TabPrc1 < &ProNovPrc TabPrc1.ForeColor = RGB(250,0,0) EndIF
&ProNovPrc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0)
//Lucro Sugestao &LucroCalc = &ProNovPrc - (&ProVlrCus + &ProImcVlrTotDsp) &LucroCalc.Tooltiptext = 'Lucro: '+trim(ProImcMarLuc.ToFormattedString()) + '% da [Sug.]' &LucroCalc.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250)
if &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovoPreco= &ProNovPrc EndIF
//NOVO PRECO &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&ProVlrCus ),2) &NovoLucro.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,250)
&NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &ProVlrCus > 0 &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &ProVlrCus) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
if &AtualizarMarKup = true &PadObsMark = '1' Else &PadObsMark = '0' Endif padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#ATUALIZARACRESCIMO#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObsMark, &PadDtaMod)
padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadOBs, &PadDtaMod) &sdtAtualizaPreco.FromJson(&PadObs)
RetornaColunasTabelas.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &filtTabCod, &TabPerCol, &TabPerCol2, &TabPerCol3,&TabPerCol4,&TabPerCol5,&TabPerCol6,&TabPerCol7,&TabPerCol8,&TabPerCol9,&tem1,&tem2,&tem3,&tem4,&tem5,&tem6,&tem7,&tem8,&tem9)
For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco &AuxTabPrc1 = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1
If &TabIsPerCol1 = true if &TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF Else if &TabPerCol2 <> 0 &TabPrc2 = round(&AuxTabPrc1 + (&AuxTabPrc1 * &TabPerCol2/100),2) Else &TabPrc2 = &AuxTabPrc1 EndIF
if &TabPerCol3 <> 0 &TabPrc3 = round(&TabPrc2 + (&TabPrc2 * &TabPerCol3/100),2) Else &TabPrc3 = &TabPrc2 EndIF
if &TabPerCol4 <> 0 &TabPrc4 = round(&TabPrc3 + (&TabPrc3 * &TabPerCol4/100),2) Else &TabPrc4 = &TabPrc3 EndIF
if &TabPerCol5 <> 0 &TabPrc5 = round(&TabPrc4 + (&TabPrc4 * &TabPerCol5/100),2) Else &TabPrc5 = &TabPrc4 EndIF
if &TabPerCol6 <> 0 &TabPrc6 = round(&TabPrc5 + (&TabPrc5 * &TabPerCol6/100),2) Else &TabPrc6 = &TabPrc5 EndIF
if &TabPerCol7 <> 0 &TabPrc7 = round(&TabPrc6 + (&TabPrc6 * &TabPerCol7/100),2) Else &TabPrc7 = &TabPrc6 EndIF
if &TabPerCol8 <> 0 &TabPrc8 = round(&TabPrc7 + (&TabPrc7 * &TabPerCol8/100),2) Else &TabPrc8 = &TabPrc7 EndIF
if &TabPerCol9 <> 0 &TabPrc9 = round(&TabPrc8 + (&TabPrc8 * &TabPerCol9/100),2) Else &TabPrc9 = &TabPrc8 EndIF EndIF
&TabProDtaIni.SetEmpty() &TabProDtaFin.SetEmpty() GravaProdutoNaTabela.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &filtTabCod, &TabUltAlt, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod, 'ADD', &TabProDtaIni, &TabProDtaFin, &AuxTabPrc1, &TabPrc2, &TabPrc3, &TabPrc4, &TabPrc5,&TabPrc6,&TabPrc7,&TabPrc8,&TabPrc9, &Context.UserName)
if &AtualizarMarKup = true &novaMargem = 0 if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus > 0 &novaMargem = (&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus / &AuxTabPrc1) * 100 Endif
Do Case Case &novaMargem < 0 &novaMargem = 0 Case &novaMargem > 1000 &novaMargem = 999.99 EndCase if &novaMargem > 0 GravaAcrescimoVenda.call(&Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod, &novaMargem) Endif
Endif
EndFor
padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) wwPlanilhaCusto_TabAcrescimo.Link(&parTabCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoDoVoltarPDV'
WWTabelaPreco.Link()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoMarcar'
For Each Line in grid &IsSel = true &ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'AtualizaSelecao' EndFor
padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPreco.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event ddo_Actions.OnOptionClicked
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case ddo_Actions.ActiveEventKey = !'Tabelas' Do 'Do Tabelas' Case ddo_Actions.ActiveEventKey = !'RemoverMarcados' Do 'Do RemoverMarcados' EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'Do Tabelas'
ConfgPlanilhaCusto.Popup(TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod) Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'Do RemoverMarcados'
wpConfirmaRemocao.Popup(&Context.EmpCod, &filtTabCod, &PadRotLin) wwPlanilhaCusto_TabAcrescimo.Link(&parTabCod)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event limpar_campo.Click
&sdtAtualizaPreco.Clear() padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) &numeric = &sdtAtualizaPreco.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos.'
Refresh
EndEvent
Event &NovoPreco.IsValid
if &NovoPreco <= 0 &NovoPreco = &ProNovPrc EndiF
do 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo' // Refresh
EndEvent
Event &ActionSelecione.Click
&ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod do 'SalvaSelecao' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &IsSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif
EndEvent
Event &gridProIMC.Click
wpAlterarAcrescimo.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod, &ProVlrCus) Refresh keep
EndEvent
Sub 'getPrecoSelecaoSDT'
&IsSel= false &NovoPreco = 0 For &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &IsSel = true &NovoPreco = &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 EndIF EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'AtualizaSelecao'
&isAChou = false for &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &isAChou = true &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco Exit EndIF EndFor
if &isAChou = false &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem = new() &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &ProVlrCus &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &sdtAtualizaPreco.Add(&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem) EndiF
&numeric = &sdtAtualizaPreco.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos.'
EndSub
Sub 'SalvaSelecao'
&isAChou = false for &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem in &sdtAtualizaPreco if &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod and &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &isAChou = true &index = &sdtAtualizaPreco.IndexOf(&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem) &sdtAtualizaPreco.remove(&index) &IsSel = false Exit EndIF EndFor
if &isAChou = false &IsSel = true &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem = new() &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.TabPrc1 = &NovoPreco &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProVlrCus = &ProVlrCus &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProCod = &ProCod &sdtAtualizaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &sdtAtualizaPreco.Add(&sdtAtualizaPrecoItem) EndiF
&numeric = &sdtAtualizaPreco.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Produtos.'
padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPreco.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod)
EndSub
Sub 'CalculaDespesaLucroNovo'
&ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod &NovoLucro = round(&NovoPreco - (&ProVlrCus),2)
&NovoAcre= 0 if &NovoPreco > 0 and &ProVlrCus > 0 &NovoAcre = round(100 - ((&NovoPreco / &ProVlrCus) * 100), 2) EndIF if &NovoAcre < 0 &NovoAcre = &NovoAcre * -1 EndIF
do 'AtualizaSelecao' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PadRotLin, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &sdtAtualizaPreco.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod)
EndSub
